required_fields.meaning: stable sample identifier inside the repository
species assignment carried by the sample row
archive project or accession family anchor for the sample
primary publication anchor for the sample claim
supporting file or source artifact behind location or sample detail
site or locality label attached to the sample
raw chronology claim kept before normalization
older bound of the normalized BP interval when defensible
younger bound of the normalized BP interval when defensible
latitude text retained from direct coordinates or later resolution
longitude text retained from direct coordinates or later resolution
how the repository derived or withheld coordinates for the sample
confidence class carried by the coordinate claim
current publication posture or blocking state for the sample row

reader_questions_answered: which project and paper describe it
which supporting source anchors its site claim
what chronology claim the repository keeps
what coordinate basis and confidence the repository keeps
whether the row is publishable, blocked, or still weak
